category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Bhutan.

title.en: China-to-Bhutan EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入不丹：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入不丹：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Bhutan BSB / BEA / BPC requirements, IEC 61851 safety expectations, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector direction, IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality evidence, Bhutan's 230/400 V 50 Hz hydro-dominant grid, high-altitude derating needs, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与不丹BSB / BEA / BPC要求、IEC 61851安全预期、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口方向、IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量证据、不丹230/400 V 50 Hz水电主导电网、高海拔降额需求，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與不丹BSB / BEA / BPC要求、IEC 61851安全預期、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口方向、IEC 61000 EMC和電能質量證據、不丹230/400 V 50 Hz水電主導電網、高海拔降額需求，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Bhutan, the practical gaps are IEC-oriented safety and EMC evidence, connector redesign from China GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC, BEA / BPC project-level grid-connection acceptance, and high-altitude derating for Himalayan deployment conditions. Bhutan's low-voltage supply should be treated as 230/400 V, 50 Hz: the 50 Hz frequency is shared with China, but the voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline, so input-voltage range, protection thresholds, thermal performance, and power-quality settings must be confirmed. Bhutan is a hydro-dominant, India-interconnected market with a nascent EV-charging sector; exporters should verify the current BSB standards route, BEA licensing or tariff requirements, BPC connection process, HS code, charger type, and site specification before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入不丹时，实务差距包括IEC体系安全及EMC证据、从中国GB/T 20234接口改为交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2、BEA / BPC项目级并网验收，以及面向喜马拉雅部署环境的高海拔降额。不丹低压供电应按230/400 V、50 Hz处理：频率与中国相同，但电压不同于中国220/380 V基线，因此必须确认输入电压范围、保护阈值、热性能和电能质量设置。不丹是水电主导并与印度互联的市场，电动汽车充电行业仍处于早期；出口商应在出货前核实现行BSB标准路径、BEA许可或电价要求、BPC接入流程、HS编码、充电桩类型和现场规范。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入不丹時，實務差距包括IEC體系安全及EMC證據、從中國GB/T 20234接口改為交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2、BEA / BPC項目級併網驗收，以及面向喜馬拉雅部署環境的高海拔降額。不丹低壓供電應按230/400 V、50 Hz處理：頻率與中國相同，但電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線，因此必須確認輸入電壓範圍、保護閾值、熱性能和電能質量設置。不丹是水電主導並與印度互聯的市場，電動汽車充電行業仍處於早期；出口商應在出貨前核驗現行BSB標準路徑、BEA許可或電價要求、BPC接入流程、HS編碼、充電樁類型和現場規範。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BSB standards determination, BEA licence or tariff ruling, BPC grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Bhutan conformity assessment rules, BSB standards adoption, BEA electricity-sector requirements, BPC project requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BSB标准适用裁定、BEA许可或电价裁定、BPC并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行不丹合格评定规则、BSB标准采纳情况、BEA电力行业要求、BPC项目要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BSB標準適用裁定、BEA許可或電價裁定、BPC併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行不丹合格評定規則、BSB標準採納情況、BEA電力行業要求、BPC項目要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
